mission.title: atlantis: Support `atlantis state rm` subcommand
mission.description: Support `atlantis state rm` subcommand. Requested by 98+ users.

steps.title: Check current atlantis deployment
steps.description:
Verify your atlantis version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
helm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working atlantis installation.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
In some cases (such as someone deleted a resource outside of the context of terraform) you need to be able to run a `terraform state rm $RESOURCE` command to resolve it.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support `atlantis state rm` subcommand
steps.description:
## what

- comment_parser can parse subcommand
  - command handles command args, so add arg count limitation by command
- add `atlantis state rm ADDRESS...` command
- add `state_rm` stage which do `init` and `state_rm` steps
  - `state_rm` step do `terraform state rm` and discard a planfile.
- not implemented in this PR
  - `state_requirements` like `apply_requirements`

## why

`terraform state rm` is required manually. If Atlantis provides this feature, we do it on GitHub PR and so on.

##

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support `atlantis state rm` subcommand" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## what

- comment_parser can parse subcommand
  - command handles command args, so add arg count limitation by command
- add `atlantis state rm ADDRESS...` command
- add `state_rm` stage which do `init` and `state_rm` steps
  - `state_rm` step do `terraform state rm` and discard a planfile.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible.
